goalbuddy_receipt_v1.rationale: The 390px failure is document overflow, not the intentional Pantry-view scroller. Evidence identifies the nonwrapping long expiry/card header and mobile two-column form rows as the bounded CSS root cause.

worker_package.objective: Inside the existing mobile breakpoint only, stack card headers, wrap/contain expiry text, collapse form rows, and contain their controls; then complete all independent gates.
verify: Require CSS source/mirror pre-hash 36419FD53641B23F3AEB30D15C88A783198170658C8662BDEC98C2DD05E712B4; preserve TSX/spec hashes.
At max-width 700 only: cardTop stretch/column; expiry flex-start/max-width100/normal wrap; formRow minmax(0,1fr); formRow labels min-width0; local inputs/selects/textarea min-width0 width100.
Preserve views internal overflow/nowrap and all content; run scoped format, lint, typecheck, mirror hash, isolated build.
Run fresh management with all behavior, containment at three widths, zero axe at three scans, three screenshots/no errors and inspect mobile.
Release port, fresh integrated 400/350/50 flow, zero axe at two scans, five screenshots/no errors.
Read-only persistence, disposable migrate/dbcheck, final port/diff/status.
stop_if: Pre-hash differs or another file/rule outside breakpoint/target selectors changes.
Views scrolling/content/desktop-tablet layout regresses or overflow/axe/build fails.
Either workflow fails twice or assertions/timeouts would change.

evidence: Long nonwrapping expiry visibly reaches the card boundary.
Mobile formRow remains two intrinsic-width columns while views scrolling is intentionally contained.

parallel_safety.rationale: One CSS/mirror/DB/artifact/port lifecycle must be serial.

required_board_updates: Keep T999 blocked and require another Judge.
